country_of_origin: Product of France
ingredients: Pasteurised cow's milk, salt, lactic culture, rennet, mould culture
long_description:
French Artisan Cheese Making
Discover the rich, buttery indulgence of Emborg French Double Cream Brie, a premium mould-ripened cheese crafted in the heart of France's Limousin region. Made using time-honoured methods refined over generations, this cheese embodies the essence of French cheesemaking tradition. Its delicate bloomy rind, developed from specialised French moulds, enhances the depth of flavour, offering a true taste of French culture and culinary heritage in every bite.


Taste Profile
Savour the smooth, velvety taste of this French classic, with layers of creamy, buttery richness and subtle hints of sweetness. Perfect on its own or as a decadent addition to your favourite dishes, Emborg French Double Cream Brie offers a delightful balance of flavours.


Natural Maturation
With time, this exceptional cheese matures naturally. Its texture becoming even smoother, while its colour evolves from bright white to a rich golden hue. As it ripens, the flavour grows more intense, making it a go to choice for both everyday indulgence and special occasions.


Pairing Suggestion
Elevate any moment with Emborg French Brie, ideal for cheese platters, sandwiches, or salads. Its buttery texture pairs beautifully with fresh fruits and nuts, and it complements bold red or medium-bodied white wines making it perfect for entertaining or simply enjoying a moment of luxury at home.
name: French Brie

This gorgeously Creamy Brie has cream added to the milk prior to the curd making stage. This boosts the amount of butterfat, resulting in a buttery mouthfeel.

A higher amount of cream in the finished product creates a well-balanced acidity as well as a decadent texture.

Teams beautifully with Maggies Beers Paste range.

- 100% Australian owned
- 100% Australian made
- Made from local Australian milk & cream
- All recipes developed by Maggie to a style she loves
- Perfect match to Maggie Beer fruit pastes

long_description:
Le Campagnier is a subtle washed rind double cream cheese with a deep amber coloured rind.
The name d'Affinois is a play on ‘affinage' - the French word for the ripening process of cheese. Using an innovative method called ultrafiltration, Jean Claude Guilloteau pioneered a new method of cheese making in the 1980's that created a luscious and velvety cheese naturally richer in proteins and minerals.

Cheese is made in Belley, a small town nestled at the foot hills of the picturesque French Alps, surrounded by ancient forests and famous for its many waterfalls, and local farmers supply the dairy with luscious milk from their herds of Montbeliardes and Holstein cows that graze on dense pastures nearby.

Named after the French word for countryside, Campagnier is a subtle washed rind double cream cheese with a deep amber coloured rind. This amber colour comes from annatto, a South American plant under which, the silky smooth texture of this soft, savoury, silky cheese delivers lactic creamy flavours.
  • French Cheese

  • Double Cream Washed Rind

  • Subtle flavour

  • silky smooth texture - soft savoury cheese
name: Cut & Wrap Campagnier

A sophisticated recipe, in our iconic half-moon shape. This Truffle Double Cream Brie Cheese delivers a unique combination of earthy and rich, bite after bite.

  • Matured from inside out.

  • With earthy notes of black truffle.

  • Strength: 3 out of 6. Mild.

  • Creatively crafted in Denmark.

  • Suitable for vegetarians..

country_of_origin: Made in Australia from 98% Australian ingredients Packaged in Australia
description: MAGGIE BEER TRUFFLE TRIPLE CREAM BRIE
ingredients: PASTEURISED COWS MILK, CREAM (MILK), SALT, NON-ANIMAL RENNET, TRUFFLE (0.02%)(TRUFFLE, TRUFFLE FLAVOUR), CULTURES (MILK).
long_description:
Create the most delicious cheeseboard with Maggie Beer's Truffle Triple Cream Brie.

Truly indulgent, this luscious Brie has the buttery mouthfeel, well-balanced acidity and decadent texture of a traditional Maggie Beer Triple Cream Brie, with the additional earthy flavour of mushroom tones from truffles.

Pair this Truffle Triple Cream Brie with one of Maggie Beer's delicious Fruit Pastes to elevate the flavour of your cheese even further!

Maggie's tips for a perfect platter:
1. Take your soft cheeses out of the fridge early enough to ensure the soft cheese is room temperature when serving. By allowing your soft cheese to reach room temperature, you will receive that deliciously gooey consistency we all adore. Keep an eye on the weather - as if it is a hot day, this process won't take long!
2. Include a nice hard cheese like an aged and deliciously crumbly Cheddar and break some of it into bite-sized chunks
3. Put a fruit paste such as Quince Paste or Quince & Champagne Paste onto your board or platter so guests can pair the paste with the selection of cheese
4. Tear chunks of a crusty sourdough baguette and heap onto your board with crackers, roasted almonds and dried pears for guests to nibble on.
5. If you are serving a pate, remove it from the fridge at the last minute and serve the pot in an ice bath to ensure it stays beautifully chilled.

All that's left is to open a bottle of your favourite wine or non-alcoholic, sit back and enjoy!
name: Truffle Triple Cream Brie

country_of_origin: Product of France
ingredients: Pasteurised cow's milk, salt, lactic culture, rennet, mould culture.
long_description:
French Artisan Cheese Making
Emborg French Camembert is a premium, mould-ripened cheese crafted in the heart of France's Limousin region. Using refined techniques rooted in French cheesemaking heritage, this cheese offers an authentic taste experience. Its signature bloomy rind, developed from local mould cultures, enriches the cheese with a complex depth of flavour, delivering a true expression of French culinary tradition.


Taste Profile
Every bite of Emborg French Camembert reveals a luscious, creamy centre with a firmer exterior. Its distinct earthy and mushroom notes, combined with a subtle tang, make it the perfect complement to mild dishes, elevating them with a touch of authentic French flair.


Natural Maturation
With time, Emborg Camembert matures beautifully, developing richer flavours and a silkier texture. Its colour gradually shifts from bright white to a warm golden hue, making it a sought-after favourite among cheese connoisseurs who appreciate the transformation that comes with natural aging.


Pairing Suggestions
Emborg French Camembert's rich, creamy profile pairs elegantly with crackers, fresh fruits, and charcuterie boards. Add a gourmet twist by incorporating it into pastas or pizzas, surprising your taste buds with its indulgent depth. For a complete sensory experience, serve it with a light red wine or a refreshing white perfect for enhancing any occasion.
name: French Camembert

ingredients: Cream Cheese (88%) (Milk, Cream (From MIlk), MIlk Solids, Salt, Vegetable Gums (Guar, Locust Bean), Preservative (Sorbic Acid), Starter Culture), Sriracha Sauce (12%) (Water, Maltodextrin, Jalapeno Puree (2.1%), Vinegar, Chilli (0.4%), Garlic, Salt, Thickener (1422), Food Acid (Citric), Vegetable Gum (Xanthan), Colour (Paprika Oleoresin), Preservative (Sorbic Acid)), Processing Aids (Contain Milk).
long_description:
Spice level : Medium 
Sriracha Philadelphia is specifically formulated to match the spicy tolerance and taste palette of Australians.

Sriracha Philly is highly versatility and works across many occasions, whether it's breakfast with Avo toast or smoked salmon, a spicy bagel with bacon, to a quick spicy lunch with chicken salad wrap, and ending the day with a spicy beef burger or a creamy spicy pasta for dinner.
Make your meals deliciously creamy with a spicy kick. 

Made in Australia with Australian Milk 
  • Deliciously creamy with a spicy kick

  • Philadelphia is made in Australia since 1956

  • Recyclable packaging

  • No artificial colours or flavours

  • Made with at least 90% Australian ingredients
name: Sriracha Cream Cheese Spread

description: YARRA VALLEY CHEESE MARINATED PERSIAN FETTA 350G
ingredients: Fetta Cheese (Pasteurised Cow's Milk, Salt, Cultures, Mineral Salt (509), Enzyme (Non-Animal Rennet), Canola Oil, Extra Virgin Olive Oil, Natural Colour (140), Garlic, Thyme, Peppercorns, Bay Leaves
long_description:
This could be the most versatile cheese in your fridge. Created using only the finest quality Australian ingredients and premium Victorian milk, our Persian Fetta will not only raise the bar of your cheese platter, it will elevate all of your favourite salads and pasta dishes to next-level delicious -- don't forget to use the oil! Simply perfect piled onto warm, crusty bread or paired with rocket and roasted root vegetables.

Handcrafted on our family-owned farm in the Yarra Valley using the same original recipe since its creation in 1994.
  • Made in Australia

  • Cows' milk cheese marinated in herbs and oil

  • Handcrafted on our family-owned farm in the Yarra Valley using the same original recipe since its creation in 1994.
name: Cheese Marinated Persian Fetta

country_of_origin: Made in Denmark
description: CASTELLO MARINATED FETTA HERBS & GARLIC IN OIL 265G
ingredients: Milk, salt, culture, non-animal rennet (microbial), Firming Agent (Calcium chloride), rapeseed oil, herbs and garlic mixture.
long_description:
Castello Marinated Greek Style cheese in oil with garlic and herbs is made using a classic recipe to create a full flavor with a balanced, tangy finish and slightly crumbly texture. It's pre-cut into convenient cubes, ready to add to salads, pizza, pasta and baked dishes. Taste the Greek Style cubes to be pleasantly surprised with fresh herbs and garlic taste that enhances any simple meal.
  • Beautifully harmonious Castello Greek Style cheese in oil with garlic and herbs.

  • Conveniently cut into cubes.

  • The absolute best of crumbly and tangy mixes well with a crunchy texture.

  • This Castello Greek Style cheese in oil is easy to use in any dish and is enjoyed by all cheese lovers around the world.

  • Creatively crafted in Denmark.

  • Suitable for vegetarians..

description: YARRA VALLEY CHEESE PERSIAN FETTA DILL & CHIVE
ingredients: Fetta Cheese (Pasteurised Cow's Milk, Salt, Cultures, Mineral Salt (509), Non-Animal Rennet), Canola Oil, Extra Virgin Olive Oil, Natural Colour (140), Garlic, Fresh Chives (0.4%), Fresh Dill (0.4%)
long_description:
This could be the most versatile cheese in your fridge. Created using only the finest quality Australian ingredients and premium Victorian milk, our Persian Fetta will not only raise the bar of your cheese platter, it will elevate all of your favourite salads and pasta dishes to next-level delicious -- don't forget to use the oil! Simply perfect piled onto warm, crusty bread or paired with rocket and roasted root vegetables.

Handcrafted on our family-owned farm in the Yarra Valley using the same original recipe since its creation in 1994
  • Made in Australia

  • Handcrafted Cow's milk cheese with dill and chives

country_of_origin: Made in Denmark from local and imported ingredients
ingredients: Pasteurised Milk, Cream (Milk), Salt, Lactic Acid Culture (Milk), Microbial Rennet, Blue Mould Culture, Maturing Culture.
long_description:
Castello Creamy Blue cheese, in its iconic half-moon shape, is a true star in Castello's portfolio. Born from trying to merge the best qualities of both brie and blue type cheeses. When maturing, it is turned 4 times in 24 hours to ensure its delicious, soft and buttery texture.
  • Creamy 150g half-moon of blue mould cheese

  • Round and milky flavour

  • Delicate sharpness that is not overpowering

  • Strength: 4 out of 6. Bold.

  • Creatively crafted in Denmark

  • Suitable for vegetarians.

long_description:
Castello Creamy Blue Cheese is a true star in our portfolio. Born from trying to merge the best qualities of both brie and blue type cheeses. The high proportion of cream in the milk used for production results in a soft buttery texture and a milky taste. We like to think it's going to taste creamier than anything you have experienced before! 
  • Creamy 300g round of blue mould cheese

  • Round shape and milky flavour

  • Delicate sharpness that is not overpowering

  • Strength: 4 out of 6. Bold.

  • Creatively crafted in Denmark

  • Suitable for vegetarians.

country_of_origin: Made in Denmark
ingredients: Pasteurised cheese milk (milk and cream), salt, lactic acid culture, rennet, blue mould culture, maturing culture
long_description:
This classic blue, made since 1927, owes its fine quality to the rich soil and verdant pastures of Denmark. Slightly crumbly and extra-creamy with abundant blue veining, it is even creamier than our Danish Blue Cheese. Straightforward and consistent, it is a wise choice for melting over a burger or stirring into a creamy salad dressing. Castello Extra Creamy Danish Blue cheese has a fine, nutty, blue mould aroma with hints of marzipan and a soft bitterness of sourdough, making it a favourite for cooking and snacking. This cheese holds a PGI (protected geographical indication) status and can only be produced in Denmark following strictly controlled production methods.
  • Sharp and salty.

  • Well balanced notes of sweet and bitter.

  • Super creamy, with a light crumbliness.

  • Strength: 6 out of 6. Intense.

  • Creatively crafted in Denmark.
name: Danish Blue Extra Creamy

country_of_origin: Made in Denmark
ingredients: Milk, Salt, Lactic acid culture
long_description:
Castello Havarti is made in Denmark and crafted using a time-honored recipe perfected over a century. The lactic acid cultures for Castello Havarti are grown in the dairy where it is produced, which gives it its unique, mild taste. True to the original process, Castello Havarti is pressed by its own weight. Resulting in an open structure with many tiny holes and a delicate consistency. Perfect for your everyday cheese craving, cheese board or sandwich. This havarti cheese will melt in your mouth and leave you with a craving for just another bite. Truly dreamily creamy.
  • 200g block of creamy havarti cheese.

  • This particular havarti cheese will melt in your mouth and leave you with a craving for just another bite. Truly dreamily creamy.

  • Mild and aromatic with just a hint of tanginess.

  • Strength: 1 out of 6. Very mild.

  • Creatively crafted in Denmark.

  • Suitable for vegetarians..

country_of_origin: Made in Denmark
ingredients: Pasteurised Milk, Salt, Lactic acid culture, non-animal rennet (microbial).
long_description:
Castello Curiously Crunchy Aged Havarti is made from a traditional recipe dating back to 1952. Typically aged for 12 months for a bold, creamy, caramel flavour, smooth texture and a curious crunch. Something happens when you age a mild, slightly tangy Danish havarti. When ageing, Castello Havarti becomes a little harder than younger havarti cheeses and develops a pleasant crunch coming from the salty crystals that begin to form. The cheese's softness thickens and becomes crumbly. Flavours gather like handfuls of crushed almonds and hazelnuts, sweet with a sharp finish. Take a bite: crunchy, hints of ham and caramelised onions, subtly satisfying.
  • 200g block of curiously crunchy speciality havarti cheese .

  • Typically matured for 12 months.

  • Buttery, with caramel notes .

  • Strength: 4 out of 6. Bold.

  • Creatively crafted in Denmark.

  • Suitable for vegetarians..
name: Aged Havarti

ingredients: Pasteurised Cow's Milk, Salt, Non-Animal Rennet
long_description:
Award Winning, 100% Australian Owned Haloumi!

Our Haloumi is made using the highest quality milk from our own farm, situated on the fertile banks of the Murray River at Corowa, NSW.

Haloumi Cheese is a semi-hard stretched curd cheese. It has a high melting point, so can easily be fried or grilled without melting. Its salty flavour and unique texture is delicious when barbequed, with a squeeze of lemon or added to salads or skewers, along with vegetables and meat. Larger cut slices are great on burgers or it can be used in baking as a grated cheese on potatoes or pizzas. Endless possibilities!
  • 100% Australian Owned & Made

  • All Natural Ingredients

  • Fresh milk from our own farm

  • Award Winning

  • Source of Protein

  • Suitable for Vegetarians.

  • Halal Certified.

long_description: Fresh Mozzarella is perfect for slicing over pizzas and lasagnas for a moist, creamy melt. The Fresh Mozzarella  is also brilliant for slicing and layering with tomato and basil for a Caprese Salad or tearing and mixing into other salads. Flavours that go well with Fresh Mozzarella include eggplant, olives, tomato, basil, parsley, and sun-dried tomatoes. Fresh Mozzarella is a type of Pasta Filata or stretched curd, which is a delicately flavoured fresh cheese that has a texture very similar to al dente pasta. It is used to carry other flavours such as fresh herbs and extra virgin olive oil in salads.

long_description:
Burrata is undoubtedly one of the most magnificent cheeses you will ever come across. It is a delicate shell of fresh mozzarella that encases stracciatella. It is a special moment of anticipation for your dinner guests when you press the knife into your Burrata to release the stracciatella from inside the heart of its mozzarella casing. The little shreds of mozzarella that makes up the stracciatella combines with the rich cream to become as soft and milky as it is decadent.

It doesnaÂ€Â™t matter how you serve it. You can break it over bread, you can break it over a pizza, you can break it over a bed of tomatoes or a salad of roasted vegetables. Whatever way you choose, season it with a little salt, pepper and a drizzle of extra virgin olive oil. But keep your recipes simple because the burrata is the hero.
name: Burrata

long_description:
Award Winning, 100% Australian Owned and Made Greek Style Fetta!

It's the extra cream in our fetta which gives it a smooth and creamy mouth feel and flavour. Perfectly balanced with a salty tang and crumbly texture, our Greek Style Fetta is uniquely delicious.

Our Fetta is made using the highest quality milk from our own farm situated on the fertile banks of the Murray River at Corowa NSW.  

Sprinkle over salads, enjoy in baked dishes or eat simply on its own with a cracker. We think our Fetta tastes better, why not try for yourself.
  • 100% Australian Owned & Made

  • Award Winning

  • All Natural Ingredients

  • Suitable for Vegetarians

  • Fresh milk from our own farm

  • Halal Certified.

ingredients: Pasteurised Cow's Milk, Salt, Non-Animal Rennet
long_description:
Award Winning, 100% Australian Owned Haloumi!

Our Haloumi is made using the highest quality milk from our own farm, situated on the fertile banks of the Murray River at Corowa, NSW.

Haloumi Cheese is a semi-hard stretched curd cheese. It has a high melting point, so can easily be fried or grilled without melting. Its salty flavour and unique texture is delicious when barbequed, with a squeeze of lemon or added to salads or skewers, along with vegetables and meat. Larger cut slices are great on burgers or it can be used in baking as a grated cheese on potatoes or pizzas. Endless possibilities!
  • 100% Australian Owned & Made

  • All Natural Ingredients

  • Fresh milk from our own farm

  • Award Winning

  • Suitable for Vegetarians

  • Halal Certified.

A delicious mix of five individually wrapped minis of Castello Creamy Blue Cheese, in its iconic half-moon shape, is a true star in our portfolio. Born from trying to merge the best qualities of both brie and blue type cheeses. The high proportion of cream in the milk used for production results in a soft buttery texture and a milky taste. We like to think it's going to taste creamier than anything you have experienced before!
  • Extra creamy individually wrapped minis of blue mould cheese

  • Round and milky flavour

  • Delicate sharpness that's not overpowering

  • Pierced in a unique star pattern

  • Creatively crafted in Denmark

  • Suitable for vegetarians.

long_description: Traditional Bocconcini is perfect for slicing over pizzas and lasagnas for a moist, creamy melt. The Traditional is also brilliant for slicing and layering with tomato and basil for a Caprese Salad or tearing and mixing into other salads. Flavours that go well with Traditional Bocconcini include eggplant, olives, tomato, basil, parsley, and sun-dried tomatoes. Traditional Bocconcini are 30g sized balls of fresh mozzarella. Bocconcini is a type of Pasta Filata or stretched curd, which is a delicately flavoured fresh cheese that has a texture very similar to al dente pasta. It is used to carry other flavours such as fresh herbs and extra virgin olive oil in salads.

We take Tasmanian free range chicken livers, mixed with creamy Tasmanian dairy, and finish it with freshly cracked pepper. Why do we use Tasmanian free range chicken? Because you can taste the difference.  The smooth robust taste will make you think of green grazing pastures.

We recommend serving our Free Range Chicken with Cracked Pepper Pate alongside a soft cheese, with some delicate crackers.

ingredients: Shell Egg
long_description:
Our smiley Free Range eggs are laid by happy country hens on farms with a maximum outdoor density of 1500 hens per hectare. That's over 6 times more space than the Australian National Free Range Standard Limit and lots of room to roam, peck and play with their friends during the day! At night they sleep inside where they are safe from other animals and harsh weather.

Our farms are independently audited, so you can feel confident that the hens laying your eggs are well cared for, and only the best quality golden-yolked Free Range eggs make it to your table to Make Every Day Sunny! All our eggs come in 100% biodegradable and compostable egg cartons.

We're proudly farmed by Aussie families with over 50 years of eggs-perience delivering nutritious food from our farms to your table.
name: Free Range Large Eggs 12 Pack

description: SUNNY QUEEN ODD EGGS READY-TO-POUR EGG MIX 500G
ingredients: Egg (72%), Water, Milk Solids, Canola Oil, Vegetable Gum (Xanthan Gum), Salt, Food Acid (Citric Acid), Natural Colour (Annatto).
long_description:
Made with perfectly good, odd eggs! At Sunny Queen Farms we value all eggs, which naturally come in different shapes & sizes. So instead of wasting those who don't fit it into the carton, we re-purpose them, like into our delicious ready-to-pour liquid egg product, so no egg is left behind. Our liquid egg mix is an easy way to create quick, delicious and nutritious meals everyone will love - even when the time is working against you! Simply pour and pow. No artificial colours or flavours, pasteurized for freshness, just 100% real Aussie free range eggs and packed in a convenient resealable and recyclable pouch to make your day sunny.

Perfect for scrambled eggs, omelettes, frittatas, egg muffins, spaghetti carbonara and much more!

We're proudly farmed by Aussie families with over 50 years of eggs-perience delivering nutritious food from our farms to your table.

country_of_origin: Produce of Australia

long_description:
Our smiley Cage Free eggs are laid by happy hens lovingly raised inside large barns with plenty of room to play! They are comfortable in these large barns while being able to flap their wings, socialise, and perch. Cosy nesting boxes are at the ready so they can lay their eggs in comfort and privacy whenever they like.

Our farms are independently audited, so you can feel confident that the hens laying your eggs are well cared for, and only the best quality golden-yolked Cage Free eggs make it to your table to Make Every Day Sunny! All our eggs come in 100% biodegradable and compostable egg cartons.

We're proudly farmed by Aussie families with over 50 years of eggs-perience delivering nutritious food from our farms to your table.

description: YALLAMUNDI FARM ORGANIC FREE RANGE EGGS 12PK 600G

long_description:
Fresh from our 100% carbon neutral family farm, our Organic eggs are kinder to hens, the earth, and the community.

Our delicious Organic eggs are certified by Australian Certified Organic and laid by hens with lots of space to freely roam, play and dustbathe amongst our shady olive groves on certified organic land. Our Organic eggs are free from chemical fertilizers, pesticides and herbicides laid by hens fed only a certified-organic diet. Theyre handpicked and packed into a 100% biodegradable and compostable egg carton. And part of the proceeds from every pack goes to the Doug Hall foundation to support the education of Aussie kids!

Yallamundi Farm eggs, Kinder by the Carton from our family to yours

country_of_origin: Produce of Australia
ingredients: Shell Egg
long_description: Our delicious Organic eggs are laid by chooks on farms with a maximum outdoor density of 1500 hens per hectare. Our chooks are free to roam, perch and play on certified organic paddocks for a minimum of 8 hours per day. They lay delicious organic eggs, free from chemical fertilizers, pesticides and herbicides.  Our Organic Farms are certified by the ACO (Australian Certified Organic), the largest independent Organic Certification body in Australia, and are independently audited to ensure strict compliance with the ACO Standard. Sunny Queen Organic Eggs come in a 100% biodegradable and compostable egg carton, so even the pack is great for the environment!

country_of_origin: Produce of Australia
ingredients: Shell Eggs
long_description:
Our smiley Organic eggs are laid by happy hens raised on wide open spaces with a maximum outdoor density of 1500 hens per hectare. Our hens are free to roam, perch and play on certified organic paddocks for a minimum of 8 hours per day. They lay delicious Organic eggs, free from chemical fertilizers, pesticides and herbicides. Our Organic Farms are certified by the ACO (Australian Certified Organic), the largest independent Organic Certification body in Australia, and are independently audited to ensure strict compliance with the ACO Standard. They come in a 100% biodegradable and compostable egg carton, so even the pack is great for the environment. Make Every Day Sunny!
We're proudly farmed by Aussie families with over 50 years of eggs-perience delivering nutritious food from our farms to your table.

country_of_origin: Australian Eggs
description: YALLAMUNDI FARM ORGANIC FREE RANGE EGGS 700G 12PK
ingredients: Shell Eggs
long_description:
Looking for an organic egg thats kinder to animals, people and the planet? Yallamundi Farms carbon-neutral organic eggs are laid by hens raised within the spacious surrounds of shady olive groves on our third-generation family farm. Housed at only 750 birds per hectare - twice the amount of space required by organic standards - our eggs are free from chemical fertilisers, pesticides and herbicides, and laid by hens fed a certified organic diet. The carbon-neutral eggs are handpicked and packed into 100% biodegradable and compostable egg cartons, and carefully brought from our home to yours.

As part of our commitment to leaving the world a better place, every sale of Yallamundi Farm eggs results in a donation to the Doug Hall Foundation, which supports education and wellbeing projects for Aussie kids.

Here at Yallamundi, were on a mission to set a new standard of egg-cellence in sustainable farming. We know you'll taste the difference.
name: Organic Free Range Eggs 12 Pack

Native Australia Pumpkin and Ricotta Ravioli Pasta crafted with quality Australian Jarrahdale Pumpkin.

The 25° Degrees South Native Pumpkin Ricotta Ravioli Pasta is elegantly crafted ravioli and flecks of sage are generously filled with earthy Jarrahdale pumpkins and creamy Victorian Ricotta.
At 25° South, we believe in quality Australian ingredients. Crafted right here in Australia.

long_description:
Coles Kitchen Chicken Parma and Roast Potatoes 200g


  • Crumbed chicken breast with roast potatoes
  • RSPCA approved Australian chicken
  • No artificial colours and flavours


Our Coles Kitchen range is all about making life easier with deliciously simple, home-style food and fresh ingredients. Coles Kitchen Chicken Parma and Roast Potatoes is a comforting, pub-style meal for one. With a crumbed chicken breast, rich tomato sauce, creamy mozzarella, and crunchy roast potatoes it's perfect lunch or dinner, ready to eat in only 3 minutes.


Coles Kitchen Chicken Parma and Roast Potatoes is made with RSPCA approved Australian chicken and contains no artificial colours and flavours. The single serve is ideal for when you're craving a warm and nourishing meal, but don't feel like cooking for one.


You can enjoy Coles Kitchen Chicken Parma and Roast Potatoes as is, or add some cooked vegetables like carrots and peas and a sprinkling of fresh herbs. Quick and delicious, and great to have on hand for a hearty meal on-the-go or no fuss mid-week dinners.
name: Chicken Parma & Roast Potatoes

long_description:
Coles Kitchen Meatball Pasta Bake 500g

- Pork and beef meatball pasta
- 4-star health rating
- No artificial colours and flavours

Our Coles Kitchen range is all about making life easier with deliciously simple, home-style food and fresh ingredients. Coles Kitchen Meatball Pasta Bake gives you the comforting taste of Italian-inspired food at home. Made with Australian beef and pork, the meatballs are packed with flavour and cooked in a rich tomato sauce, then served over pasta and topped with cheddar cheese.

Coles Kitchen Meatball Pasta Bake is perfect for four people and contains 1 serve of vegetable per portion. With a 4-star health rating and no artificial colours and flavours it"s a great choice for a no-fuss, nourishing meal the family will love.

Coles Kitchen Meatball Pasta Bake is ready to heat and eat. Just pop it in the oven for 45 minutes until it"s golden brown and piping hot. Or transfer to a microwave safe dish if you want it done sooner. Scatter with a few halved cherry tomatoes and fresh basil leaves before baking.
name: Family Meatball Pasta Bake

On The Menu offers a tasty selection of meals inspired by classic Aussie favourites and global cuisines. The tastiest ready meals made with quality ingredients - from comforting Pub Faves, Big Feast to modern Bowls and Family Faves - there's a flavour for everyone. Perfect for lunch or dinner, they're ready in minutes.

long_description:
Coles Kitchen Chicken and Bacon Mac and Cheese 1.2kg


  • Chicken and bacon pasta bake
  • Serves 4
  • No artificial colours and flavours


Our Coles Kitchen range is all about making life easier with deliciously simple, home-style food and fresh ingredients. Coles Kitchen Chicken and Bacon Mac and Cheese gives you all the comforting tastes of Italian-inspired food without the prep. It's made with succulent Australian chicken breast combined with bacon pieces and durum wheat pasta, finished with a creamy cheese sauce. Full of flavour and ready to heat and eat.


Best baked in the oven, Coles Kitchen Chicken and Bacon Mac and Cheese can also be transferred to a microwave safe dish to cut down on cooking time.


When it's ready, you can enjoy Coles Kitchen Chicken and Bacon Mac and Cheese on its own or served alongside your favourite salads and sides. Try pairing it with a simple tomato and basil salad with balsamic dressing, and add some crusty bread for mopping up all that delicious cheesy sauce.
name: Family Chicken & Bacon Pasta Bake

long_description:
Coles Kitchen Chicken Tikka Bites 200g


  • Boneless chicken tikka
  • Ready in 15 minutes
  • No artificial colours and flavours


Our Coles Kitchen range is all about making life easier with deliciously simple, home-style food and fresh ingredients. These Indian-inspired Coles Kitchen Chicken Tikka Bites are made with succulent Australian chicken thighs and marinated in yoghurt, garlic and aromatic spices then cooked to perfection and cut into bite-sized pieces.


Coles Kitchen Chicken Tikka Bites are boneless with a mild spice level, so they're great for kids, and they're ready in the oven or air fryer in just 15 minutes so you can get dinner on the table, fast.


These versatile little Coles Kitchen Chicken Tikka Bites can be used in all kinds of different dishes. You can serve them as a tasty bite with a creamy dipping sauce, or pair with steamed basmati rice, naan, fresh coriander and cucumber raita. Or drizzle with garlic yoghurt sauce and wrap in a soft flatbread with your favourite sliced vegetables.
name: Chicken Tikka Bites

long_description:
Coles Heat and Go Mild Chicken Curry and Rice 350g

  • RSPCA-approved Australian chicken
  • Good source of protein
  • Ready in 3.5 minutes


Coles Heat and Go Mild Chicken Curry and Rice is a delicious, home-style meal, ready to heat and enjoy in just 3.5 minutes.


Made with a blend of cream and aromatic spices including paprika, fennel, coriander, cumin, Garam Masala, turmeric and chilli powder, it's a rich and warming meal that's finished with fluffy basmati rice.


Coles Heat and Go Mild Chicken Curry and Rice uses 100% Australian-grown chicken sourced from Aussie farmers and suppliers who share our passion for great tasting, quality chicken, and RSPCA-approved farming.


Coles Heat and Go Mild Chicken Curry and Rice has no artificial colours and flavours and a mild level of spiciness so it's family friendly. Serve on its own, or with warm garlic naan and a sprinkling of fresh coriander leaves. Great to have on hand for when you're craving a nourishing meal but don't have time to cook.
name: Chicken Curry & Rice

description: COLES KITCHEN SWEET & SOUR CHICKEN & RICE 350G
ingredients: INGREDIENTS: Sweet & Sour Chicken (57%) [Water, Cooked RSPCA Approved Australian Chicken (22%), Vinegar, Brown Sugar, Red Capsicum (4.0%), Onion, Corn Starch, Tomato Paste, Pineapple (2.5%), Canola Oil, Spring Onion, Garlic Paste, Vegetable Stock Seasoning (contains Natural Flavouring), Crushed Ginger, Salt, Natural Preservative (234), Natural Colour (Paprika Oleoresins)], Cooked Long Grain Rice (43%).
long_description:
Coles Kitchen Sweet & Sour Chicken & Rice 350g

• Australian chicken breast
• 4-star health rating
• No artificial colours and flavours

Our Coles Kitchen range is all about making life easier with deliciously simple, home-style food and fresh ingredients. Coles Kitchen Sweet & Sour Chicken & Rice is the perfect meal for one. With the classic combination of tangy sweet and sour sauce and RSPCA approved Australian chicken it packs a powerful flavour punch. Finished with sliced red capsicum and juicy pineapple pieces and served over long grain rice it's a complete meal that takes just 3 ½ minutes to heat in the microwave.

Coles Kitchen Sweet & Sour Chicken & Rice is a good source of protein and contains no artificial colours and flavours giving it a 4-star health rating.

Serve Coles Kitchen Sweet & Sour Chicken & Rice on its own, or add some fresh coriander leaves and some sliced chilli if you prefer a bit of heat. Great to have on hand for when you're craving a tasty and nourishing meal but don't feel like cooking.

long_description:
Coles Kitchen Chicken Fajita and Rice 350g


  • Chicken fajita and rice
  • 4-star health rating
  • No artificial colours and flavours


Our Coles Kitchen range is all about making life easier with deliciously simple, home-style food and fresh ingredients. Coles Kitchen Chicken Fajita and Rice is made with succulent RSPCA approved Australian chicken breast cooked in a smokey Tex Mex sauce with red and green capsicum and served on a bed of long grain rice.


Coles Kitchen Chicken Fajita and Rice contains no artificial colours and flavours and is ready in the microwave in just 3.5 minutes. It has a mild spice level so it's great for kids and with a 4-star health rating and 1 serve of vegetables, parents love it too.


Coles Kitchen Chicken Fajita and; Rice is perfect to have on hand for when you need a quick and nourishing meal. It's delicious as is or you can make it your own with some of your favourite toppings, like sour cream, grated cheese, fresh coriander, and sliced red chillies for a spicy kick.

ingredients: INGREDIENTS: Chilli Con Carne Sauce (57%) [No Added Hormone Australian Beef Mince (28%), Water, Red Kidney Beans (16.5%) (Red Kidney Beans, Water, Salt, Sugar), Tomato Paste (9%) (Tomato, Acidity Regulator (330)), Diced Tomato (7%), Red Capsicum, Onion, Corn Starch, Sugar, Cumin, Beef Flavoured Seasoning (contains Flavourings, Natural Colour (150a, Turmeric)), Worcestershire Sauce Powder (contains Natural Colour (150a)), Smokey Paprika (contains Smoke Flavouring), Garlic Granules, Chipotle Chilli Powder (0.2%), Canola Oil, Natural Preservative (234), Salt], Cooked Long Grain Rice (43%).
long_description:
Coles Kitchen Chilli Con Carne and Rice 350g


  • Australian beef in a rich chili sauce
  • 4-star health rating
  • No artificial colours and flavours


Our Coles Kitchen range is all about making life easier with deliciously simple, home-style food and fresh ingredients.


This Mexican-Inspired Coles Kitchen Chilli Con Carne and Rice is the perfect meal for one, ready in just 3 minutes in the microwave. It's made with 100% Australian beef and slow cooked in a rich chilli sauce with red kidney beans and warm spices like cumin and smokey paprika. It's served over rice making it a complete meal that's packed with flavour and goodness.


Coles Kitchen Chilli Con Carne and Rice has a mild spice level so it's kid-friendly and contains 1 serve of vegetables giving it a 4-star health rating.


Great for quick and tasty lunches or mid-week dinners, Coles Kitchen Chilli Con Carne and Rice can be enjoyed as is, or you can add all your favourite Tex Mex toppings like grated cheese, sour cream, salsa and guacamole.
name: Chilli Con Carne & Rice

ingredients: Pastry (Wheat Flour, Water, Animal Fat, Salt, Emulsifiers (471, Soy Lecithin), Antioxidants (307b, 320), Natural Colour (Carotene), Natural Flavour, Wheat Gluten, Milk Powder), Australian Beef (17%), Mushroom (5%) (Mushroom, Salt, Food Acid (Citric Acid)), Onion, Red Wine (3%) (Contains Preservative (220)), Tomato Paste (Contains Food Acid (Citric Acid)), Carrot, Thickener (1442), Seasoning (Contains Natural Colour (Caramel I), Flavour Enhancers (621, 635), Wheat, Natural Flavours, Food Acid (Citric Acid)), Garlic, Pepper, Poppy Seed.
long_description:
National Pies are proudly Tassie, Proudly different.

There's a few things us Tasmanians hold close to our hearts - our state's natural beauty , quality produce, a love for risque art galleries, and last but not least, and our iconic National Pies.

Yes, we're baked differently down here - but in the best possible ways:

100% AUSSIE BEEF

128 LAYERS OF PUFF PASTRY

PASTRY PIONEERS SINCE 1942

100% TASSIE MADE

So heat it up, squirt on some sauce and enjoy the pies we love and are proud to share with the nation!
  • 100% AUSSIE BEEF

  • NO ARTIFICIAL COLOURS OR FLAVOURS

  • 100% TASSIE MADE

  • DELIVERED FRESH NOT FROZEN

  • 128 LAYERS OF PUFF PASTRY

  • PASTRY PIONEERS SINCE 1942.

  • 15 MINUTES IN THE OVEN.

  • Recyclable tray.

description: COLES KITCHEN FAMILY SIDE MASHED POTATO 600G

long_description:
Coles Kitchen Mashed Potato 600g


  • No artificial colours
  • Ready in 7 minutes
  • Serves 4


Our Coles Kitchen range is all about making life easier with deliciously simple, home-style food and fresh ingredients.


This deliciously fuss-free Coles Kitchen Mashed Potato combines fluffy potatoes with a splash of cream and butter, then they're mashed to perfection and seasoned with a sprinkling of salt and white pepper. They're ready to heat and eat in only 7 minutes giving you all the comfort of creamy mashed potato without any of the hassle.


Coles Kitchen Mashed Potato pairs well with so many dishes. It's great with everything from sausages to meatballs to roast chicken to baked fish. It's especially good with any type of gravy or sauce and complements most vegetarian mains. You can enjoy it as is, or dress it up with fresh chopped parsley or chives, add some wholegrain mustard, horseradish cream, or roasted garlic, or mix in some grated parmesan cheese and truffle oil.
name: Family Side Mashed Potato

- No artificial colours and flavours

Our Coles Kitchen range is all about making life easier with deliciously simple, home-style food and fresh ingredients.
These Coles Kitchen Hoisin Pork Spring Rolls are made with quality Australian pork, fresh vegetables and a blend of spices. They're jam packed with flavour and wrapped in layers of flaky pastry for a satisfying crunch. Perfect for snacks and popular at parties, they also make great appetisers for any Asian-inspired meal.

Coles Kitchen Hoisin Pork Spring Rolls are ready to heat and eat and take just 12 minutes in the oven or air fryer. Serve with your favourite dipping sauce, like crunchy peanut or hoisin. For a simple but tasty lunch, try wrapping Coles Kitchen Hoisin Pork Spring Rolls in a crisp lettuce leaf with some fresh coriander and cucumber slices. They also make great additions to noodle dishes and broth-based soups for quick and delicious mid-week meals.

long_description:
Coles Kitchen Vegetable Spring Rolls 200g


  • Vegetable spring rolls
  • 5 pieces
  • No artificial colours and flavours


Our Coles Kitchen range is all about making life easier with deliciously simple, home-style food and fresh ingredients. Like these Coles Kitchen Vegetable Spring Rolls. Golden brown and crispy on the outside and filled with a blend of fresh vegetables and vermicelli noodles. They're the perfect snack or appetiser to accompany any meal.


Coles Kitchen Vegetable Spring Rolls feature a classic mix of cabbage, carrot, spring onions and beansprouts with shiitake mushrooms in a light soy and hoisin sauce. Simple, healthy and delicious, they're ready to cook in the oven or air fryer in just 12 minutes.


Serve Coles Kitchen Vegetable Spring Rolls as is, or with your favourite dipping sauce. Sweet chilli sauce is a great kid-friendly option, or you could whip up a creamy peanut sauce with peanut butter, soy sauce, fresh lime juice, brown sugar, grated ginger and garlic. Add a little red chilli for a spicy kick of flavour.
name: Vegetable Spring Rolls

long_description:
Coles Kitchen Halloumi Chips 180g


  • Halloumi chips
  • Vegetarian
  • No artificial colours and flavours


Our Coles Kitchen range is all about making life easier with deliciously simple, home-style food and fresh ingredients. These Coles Kitchen Halloumi Chips are made with thickly cut slices of vegetarian halloumi, lightly coated in a crisp breadcrumb batter. All you need to do is pop them in the oven for 10 minutes until they're warmed through, then enjoy.


Coles Kitchen Halloumi Chips are golden brown and crunchy on the outside with a gooey, cheesy centre that makes them so irresistible. Served with a wedge of lemon and a drizzle of aioli, they'll quickly become your go-to savoury treat or party favourite. Try Coles Kitchen Halloumi Chips topped with a poached egg and cooked spinach for a twist on the classic weekend breakfast. Toss them through salads and roasted vegetables to serve at your next barbeque or arrange them on toasted ciabatta with fresh tomato and basil for a simple but delicious sandwich.
name: Haloumi Chips

long_description:
With Lurpak by your side you're always ready to cook, bake and fry up wonders, cook. With its delicate taste, Lurpak Unsalted Butter enhances the flavour of whatever food you add it to. From a hearty risotto dish, your weekend baking creations to some simple earthy mushrooms, its subtle notes complement every creation you russle up in the kitchen. For people who love Good Food, Lurpak makes it even better. Now sleeves up. Today we cook bold.
  • Made from 100% fresh milk

  • No added salt

  • Distinctive, creamy, delicate and fresh taste.

  • Perfect for cooking, baking or spreading

  • Suitable for freezing

  • Suitable for vegetarians.

long_description:
Set your senses alive with the great fusion of our creamy Lurpak butter with the rich complex taste of garlic. Lurpak with crushed garlic is the ideal combination, a match made in heaven. And in a handy compact 125g size its perfect just to simply slice off what you need and let the heat turn up in the kitchen.

Let Lurpak garlic butter sizzle in your hot pan of seasonal veg, melt it into your hearty soup or spread it onto some freshly hand baked bread. Turn simple into glorious. The crushed garlic richness delivers in every savory creation you russle up in the kitchen. For people who love Good Food, Lurpak makes it even better. Now sleeves up. Today we cook bold.
  • Made from fresh milk

  • Distinctive, creamy, rich and complex taste.

  • Perfect for cooking or spreading

  • Suitable for freezing

  • Suitable for vegetarians

Chef's Choice Unsalted Butter: Ideal for sweet baking and pastry.

Cultured Butter: Expertly crafted for a creamier finish

Proudly Victorian: Made in Cobden, Western Victoria using local dairy.

Western Star Chef's Choice Unsalted Cultured Butter is a premium baking butter made in Cobden, Western Victoria. Cultured for a creamier finish, it's ideal for pastry and sweet baking. As an unsalted butter, it also gives you full control over seasoning in delicate recipes. This product is perfect for those looking for best baking butter.

long_description:
With a blend of nutritious sunflower and canola oils and just the right amount of buttermilk, FLORA Buttery gives you and your family all the benefits of plant goodness with the delicious taste you love. It is perfect for families who prefer an alternative to butter but still fancy something scrumptious. Enjoy FLORA Buttery on fluffy pancake, dollop it on hot vegetables or add it to your cupcake mix for a little extra guilt-free indulgence. FLORA Buttery contains 65% less saturated fat than butter and naturally contains Omega 6 and Vitamin E.

Visit www.floraspread.com.au for information, recipe, and tips.
  • Made with natural flavours and colours

  • Treat yourself to the irresistible, buttery taste of Flora margarine with 65% less saturated fat than butter.

ingredients: (All from vegetable sources) Water, vegetable oil, 8% plant sterols, salt, emulsifiers (471, sunflower lecithin), natural flavour, vitamins A, D, E, natural colour (beta carotene)
long_description:
Made with added plant sterols, clinically proven to reduce LDL (bad) cholesterol by up to 10% in just 3 weeks when enjoyed daily as part of a healthy diet.* Plant sterols work by reducing the absorption of cholesterol, naturally supporting heart health.

Dairy and Soy Free and favourite for those who just love the taste of butter - but want a healthier option. Enjoy a dollop on your veggies, topped on your toast, or use in any traditional butter-based recipe to make it just that little bit better.

*25g of Nuttelex Cholesterol Lowering spread contains 2g of plant sterols, the perfect daily amount to lower your cholesterol. Plant sterols do not provide additional benefits when consumed in excels of 3g per day. People on cholesterol lowering medication should follow doctors advice when using Cholesterol Lowering Spread. Children under 5 or pregnant and lactating women have specific dietary needs and should seek doctors advice.

long_description:
This tasty dairy free block cooks and bakes just like butter, is made from a blend of premium plant oils, including sunflower oil, and is 100% free from lactose and gluten.

Its versatility makes it an easy 1:1 swap for butter in cakes and buttercream, cookies, pasta sauces, deglazing, and stir-frying. It's also delicious on toast, through potato mash and roasted veggies too. 

Visit www.floraspread.com.au for information, recipe, and tips.

long_description: Fairy is a specialty blend cooking margarine that has been used by Australian families since since the 1930s. It's a fail proof traditional margarine for home baking & cooking and it's special blend of animal fats produces outstanding baking results.  From birthday parties, to baking at home with the family, Fairy Margarine is ideal for baking cakes, puddings, icings, Anzac biscuits and more. Fairy is Australian made and owned and with exceptional quality remains true to its heritage.

Free from gluten ingredients and palm oil, Copha is made from 99% coconut oil. Copha is versatile and can be used in many different baking applications. From traditional birthday and Christmas party recipes, to modern recipes, Copha has always been associated with fun, family and sweet childhood memories for over 70 years.

FLORA Light spread is perfect for families who prefer a lighter spread alternative to butter but still fancy a scrumptious mouthful! FLORA Light is made with sunflower seed oil, a source of Omega 6 and Vitamin E and contains 75% less saturated fat than butter. Spread FLORA Light on a toast or dollop it on hot vegetables for a delicious guilt free meal.

Visit www.floraspread.com.au for information, recipe, and tips.
  • Made with natural flavours and colours

  • Suitable for vegetarians

long_description:
Soft'n'Less Salt: Our lowest salt spreadable.

Iconic Western Star Taste: With 40% less salt than Original Soft Spreadable.

Ideal for Spreadable: A practical, everyday favourite for breakfast, lunch and snacks.

Proudly Victoria: Made in Cobden, Western Victoria using local dairy.

Western Star Soft'n'Less Salt Spreadable delivers the same five-star flavour you know and love, with 40% less salt than our Original Spreadable. Made in Victoria's Western District, it's perfect for sandwiches, toast and everyday meals, ideal for those looking to reduce their salt intake without compromising on taste.

description: WESTERN STAR SPREADABLE BLEND:REDUCED SALT:.:500 GRAM
ingredients: Pasteurised cream (milk), vegetable oil, butteroil (milk), salt, buttermilk powder (milk), emulsifier (soy lecithin), Preservative (202), flavour, acidity regulator (lactic acid), vitamins (A, D), colour (B-carotene). Dairy Content: Min 60%, Vegetable Oil: Min 34%
long_description:
Soft'n'Less Salt: Our lowest salt spreadable.

Iconic Western Star Taste: With 40% less salt than Original Soft Spreadable.

Ideal for Spreadable: A practical, everyday favourite for breakfast, lunch and snacks.

Proudly Victoria: Made in Cobden, Western Victoria using local dairy.

Western Star Soft'n'Less Salt Spreadable delivers the same five-star flavour you know and love, with 40% less salt than our Original Spreadable. Made in Victoria's Western District, it's perfect for sandwiches, toast and everyday meals, ideal for those looking to reduce their salt intake without compromising on taste.
